title: abutilon flavum
intro: Abutilon flavum, also known as yellow mallow, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Abutilon flavum include its potential to treat fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its antioxidant and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, Abutilon flavum is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
